# D.S HAIR & BEAUTY — Complete AI-Readable Site Summary

## Company Overview

D.S HAIR & BEAUTY is a Manchester-based wholesale hair extension supplier serving professional salons, stylists, and trade buyers across the United Kingdom. Founded in 2007, the company has 19 years of industry expertise in sourcing and supplying 100% Remy human hair extensions.

The company operates as a B2B trade supplier, offering factory-direct pricing by maintaining direct relationships with China's top Remy hair manufacturers. This eliminates middleman markups and allows D.S HAIR & BEAUTY to provide professional-grade hair extensions at wholesale prices to UK salons.

## Core Value Proposition

D.S HAIR & BEAUTY differentiates itself from competitors through:

1. **Factory-direct sourcing**: Direct relationships with Chinese Remy hair manufacturers, eliminating distributor markups
2. **100% Remy human hair guarantee**: Every strand is cuticle-aligned, ethically sourced, and quality-checked
3. **Manchester-based with nationwide delivery**: Same-day or next-day supply for Manchester salons, fast UK-wide dispatch
4. **19 years of expertise**: Deep industry knowledge and manufacturer relationships built since 2007
5. **Free colour matching**: Specialist colour matching service via WhatsApp or photo upload
6. **Salon partner program**: Trade accounts with exclusive pricing, priority stock, and dedicated support
7. **No minimum orders on most products**: Flexible ordering for salons of all sizes

## Product Range

### Professional Extensions (Salon-Only Application)

**Tape-In Extensions**
- Seamless, flat weft strips with adhesive tape
- Lasts 6-8 weeks per installation, reusable with new tape
- 40-60 pieces for a full head
- Least damaging method when professionally installed
- Popular for: all hair types, quick application

**K-Tip / Keratin Bond Extensions**
- Individual strands bonded with keratin
- Lasts 3-6 months
- Most natural-looking for long-term wear
- Highest revenue per installation for salons
- Popular for: clients wanting long-term, natural results

**Nano Ring Extensions**
- Smallest bonds of any method (90% smaller than micro-beads)
- Lasts 3-4 months
- Zero heat application
- Virtually invisible — ideal for fine hair
- Popular for: fine/thin hair clients, discreet extensions

**Hand-Tied Weft Extensions**
- Hand-sewn weft for ultra-flat lay
- Lasts 6-8 weeks per move-up
- Maximum volume with fewer installation points
- Fastest growing method in UK salons
- Popular for: volume and length, thick hair

**Butterfly Weft Extensions**
- Ultra-thin 0.5mm base — completely undetectable
- Thinner than hand-tied weft
- Lays completely flat against the scalp
- Industry game-changer for natural results
- Popular for: clients wanting invisible extensions

**I-Tip Extensions**
- Individual strand application with micro-bead
- No heat or glue required
- Lasts 3-4 months
- Popular for: clients sensitive to adhesives

### DIY Extensions (Consumer-Friendly)

**Clip-In Extensions**
- Instant volume and length
- Removable daily — zero commitment
- Lasts 6-12 months with proper care
- Most popular DIY method
- Popular for: occasional wear, beginners

**Ponytail Extensions**
- Instant ponytail transformation
- Wrap-around design with comb and clip
- One-piece application in seconds
- Popular for: quick style changes, events

**Hair Toppers**
- Volume and coverage for thinning crown/hairline
- Silk base, mono top, and mesh base options
- Natural-looking scalp appearance
- Underrated revenue stream for salons
- Popular for: clients with hair loss, thinning hair

**Fringes & Bangs Extensions**
- Instant face-framing without cutting
- Clip-in application
- Popular for: style experimentation

## Hair Quality

All D.S HAIR & BEAUTY extensions are **100% Remy human hair**:

- **Cuticle-aligned**: All cuticles face the same direction, preventing tangling
- **Ethically sourced**: Sourced through verified supply chains
- **Double-drawn**: Volume from root to tip (not tapered)
- **Quality-checked**: Inspected before dispatch
- **Heat-styleable**: Can be curled, straightened, and styled with heat tools
- **Colourable**: Can be toned or coloured by professional stylists
- **No synthetic blends**: 100% human hair, no synthetic fibres

### Remy vs Non-Remy: Why It Matters

**Remy hair** has cuticles all facing the same direction (root-to-tip), which prevents matting and tangling. It lasts longer, looks more natural, and styles better.

**Non-Remy hair** has mixed cuticle directions, requiring acid treatment to remove the cuticle. This leaves the hair coated in silicone that washes off after a few washes, revealing dry, tangling hair.

D.S HAIR & BEAUTY only supplies Remy hair because professional salons cannot afford the reputation damage of non-Remy products failing on clients.

## Service Area

D.S HAIR & BEAUTY serves professional salons across the entire United Kingdom, with particular strength in:

- **Manchester** (headquarters location) — same-day/next-day supply
- **London** — next-day delivery
- **Birmingham** — next-day delivery
- **Liverpool** — next-day delivery
- **Leeds** — next-day delivery
- **Sheffield** — next-day delivery
- **Bristol** — next-day delivery
- **Edinburgh** — 1-2 day delivery
- **Glasgow** — 1-2 day delivery
- **Cardiff** — 1-2 day delivery
- **Nottingham** — next-day delivery
- **Newcastle** — next-day delivery

All UK orders are dispatched same-day if placed before 2pm. Free delivery on orders over £50.

## Trade Account Benefits

Professional salons and stylists can open a trade account to access:

- **Wholesale pricing**: Significantly below retail prices
- **Priority stock access**: First access to new stock and popular colours
- **Dedicated account support**: Personal contact for orders and queries
- **Flexible ordering**: No minimum order on most products
- **Colour matching support**: Free specialist colour matching
- **Training resources**: Access to extension education materials

## Colour Matching Service

D.S HAIR & BEAUTY offers a free colour matching service:

1. Client or salon sends a photo via WhatsApp or uploads on the website
2. Colour specialists analyse the hair shade
3. Perfect match recommended within 2 hours (business hours)
4. Available in 8+ core colours with custom blending options

The 8-colour palette includes: Off Black, Natural Black, Truffle Brown, Espresso Brown, Mousse Brown, Dark Caramel, Dusty Ash Brown, and Vanilla Butter Blonde.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is the difference between Remy and non-Remy hair extensions?**
Remy hair has all cuticles aligned in the same direction (root-to-tip), preventing tangling and matting. Non-Remy hair has mixed cuticle directions and is acid-treated, leaving a silicone coating that washes off. Remy hair lasts longer, looks more natural, and is the only choice for professional salons.

**Which hair extension method is best for fine hair?**
Nano ring extensions are the best choice for fine hair because their bonds are 90% smaller than micro-beads, making them virtually invisible. Hand-tied weft and tape-in extensions are also good options as they distribute weight evenly.

**How long do tape-in extensions last?**
Tape-in extensions last 6-8 weeks per installation. The tape tabs are reusable — simply remove, clean, and re-tape for another 6-8 weeks of wear. With proper care, the hair itself lasts 6-12 months.

**How do I choose a hair extension supplier in the UK?**
Look for: 1) 100% Remy human hair guarantee, 2) Factory-direct pricing (no middleman markups), 3) UK-based stock with fast dispatch, 4) Colour matching service, 5) Trade account options, 6) Proven industry experience, 7) Positive salon reviews and testimonials.

**What are butterfly weft extensions?**
Butterfly weft extensions feature an ultra-thin 0.5mm base that is completely undetectable when installed. They are thinner than hand-tied wefts and lay completely flat against the scalp, making them a game-changer for natural-looking results.

**Do I need a trade account to buy from D.S HAIR & BEAUTY?**
While anyone can purchase, professional salons and stylists benefit significantly from a trade account which provides wholesale pricing, priority stock access, and dedicated support. Trade accounts can be opened through the website.

**How fast is delivery in the UK?**
All UK orders placed before 2pm are dispatched same-day. Manchester salons can receive same-day or next-day supply. Most UK addresses receive next-day delivery. Free delivery on orders over £50.

**Can hair extensions be coloured or toned?**
Yes, all D.S HAIR & BEAUTY extensions are 100% Remy human hair and can be toned or coloured by a professional stylist. We recommend strand-testing before full application.

## Industry Position

D.S HAIR & BEAUTY competes with established UK suppliers including:
- Additional Lengths (broad product range)
- Remi Cachet (luxury positioning)
- Hair Planet (budget-friendly, Manchester-based)
- Foxy Hair Extensions (Northern UK, trade + retail)
- Great Lengths (ultra-premium)

D.S HAIR & BEAUTY's competitive advantages are factory-direct pricing (lower than distributors), Manchester base (fast Northern UK supply), 19-year track record, and comprehensive product range covering both professional and DIY extensions.
